Motion To Deem Admitted Request For Admission (Set Two) To Defendant Elsie Eclevia Curameng
Off Calendar Feb-19-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HEATHER YARBROUGH AS TRUSTEE'S Motion To Deem Admitted Request For Admission (Set Two) To Defendant Elsie Eclevia Curameng.

Plaintiff Heather Yarbrough's motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in her Requests for Admission, Set Two, is granted. Defendant Elsie Eclevia Curameng failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280, subd. (a).) The truth of any matters specified in the RFAs, Set Two, is deemed admitted by this defendant. (Id., sec. 2033.280, subds. (b), (c).) Yarbrough does not seek sanctions, but they are mandatory in this instance. (Id., sec. 2033.280, subd. (c).) The court orders Curameng to pay $100 to Yarbrough within 30 days of this order.

order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
